insight.headline: Customer Account API Update
insight.what_changed: The Customer Account API version 2026-10 removes the deprecated Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout field and the Checkout type subtree. This change affects apps using the Customer Account API to manage customer checkouts.
insight.developer_impact: Developers should update their apps to remove any references to the removed fields and types. They should also review their checkout management logic to ensure it is compatible with the updated API. The Admin GraphQL API and Storefront API may also be affected if they are used in conjunction with the Customer Account API. Developers can use the GraphQL Admin API to manage customer checkouts and orders, and should test their apps with the updated API version to ensure compatibility.
insight.merchant_impact: Merchants may experience changes in how customer checkouts are managed, but the impact should be minimal if developers update their apps accordingly.
insight.why_it_matters: This update is important because it ensures that the Customer Account API is consistent and efficient, and it allows developers to build more robust and reliable checkout management systems.

also_worth_knowing.text: Updated App Store Requirements: 1.3 Always Use Honest and Transparent Review Practices

updates.summary: The CLI has been updated to version 4.4.0 with various fixes and improvements, including the validation of GCS bundle upload status and the fixing of long URL wrapping in banner/alert footnotes.

updates.title: Updated App Store Requirements: 1.3 Always Use Honest and Transparent Review Practices
updates.summary: The Shopify App Store requirements policy 1.3 has been updated to clarify the use of honest and transparent review practices for all apps published to the App Store.

updates.title: Customer Account API Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout and Checkout types removed in 2026-10
updates.summary: The Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout field and the Checkout type subtree have been removed from the Customer Account API as of version 2026-10.

updates.title: Markets APIs now support MarketRegionSubdivision
updates.summary: The Markets APIs now support MarketRegionSubdivision, allowing apps to encounter Markets configured with country-subdivision regions.

updates.title: OrderDisplayFulfillmentStatus now returns FULFILLMENT_NOT_REQUIRED for orders with no items to fulfill
updates.summary: The OrderDisplayFulfillmentStatus enum now returns FULFILLMENT_NOT_REQUIRED for orders with no items to fulfill as of API version 2026-10.

updates.title: Shop Minis May June 2026 update
updates.summary: The Shop Minis update includes new features such as product variant intents and typed product variant intent hooks for selecting variants and adding variants to cart.

updates.title: Market-driven shipping now available in feature preview
updates.summary: Market-driven shipping is now available in feature preview, allowing merchants to attach shipping options directly to each market and vary rates by product.

updates.title: @shopify/mini-oxygen@4.2.0
updates.summary: The @shopify/mini-oxygen package has been updated to version 4.2.0, making the Oxygen Vite plugin self-sufficient and inferring a compatibility date from the resolved Hydrogen package.

updates.title: @shopify/cli-hydrogen@13.0.0
updates.summary: The @shopify/cli-hydrogen package has been updated to version 13.0.0, adding deploy flags and environment variables for configuring Oxygen's client assets directory and worker directory.

updates.title: Draft order deposit fields are now available in the GraphQL Admin API and Customer Account API
updates.summary: Draft order deposit fields are now available in the GraphQL Admin API and Customer Account API, allowing apps to set a deposit when creating or updating a draft order.

updates.title: Deprecation of cumulative marketing engagements
updates.summary: The isCumulative argument to the marketingEngagementCreate mutation is being deprecated, defaulting to false, and integrations should be updated to send non-cumulative engagements as needed.

updates.title: New `lineItem` field on the `GiftCard` object
updates.summary: A new lineItem field has been added to the GiftCard object in the GraphQL Admin API, representing the LineItem from the order that initiated the gift card's creation.

recap.headline: Shopify updates focus on market-driven shipping, GraphQL Admin API, and Hydrogen improvements

themes.title: Market-driven shipping
themes.detail: Market-driven shipping is now available in feature preview, allowing merchants to configure shipping directly on a market. The GraphQL Admin API supports market-driven shipping configuration as of API version 2026-07. Merchant-owned delivery profile APIs are deprecated for market-driven shipping.

themes.title: GraphQL Admin API updates
themes.detail: The GraphQL Admin API has several updates, including the removal of the deprecated Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout field, the addition of draft order deposit fields, and the exposure of discount application information for draft orders. The API also now returns FULFILLMENT_NOT_REQUIRED for orders with no items to fulfill.

themes.title: Hydrogen and development tooling
themes.detail: Hydrogen has several updates, including the release of @shopify/mini-oxygen@4.2.0 and @shopify/cli-hydrogen@13.0.0. Hydrogen can now be deployed to Vercel in a few clicks. The CLI has also been updated to version 4.4.0, which includes fixes for long URL wrapping and GCS bundle upload validation.

actions.text: Update apps to use market-driven shipping configuration
Replace deprecated fields with new ones (e.g., discountedUnitPrice with approximateDiscountedUnitPrice)
